calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-28-2005 Judgment Entered

RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
Off Calendar Mar-23-2005 Set For Trial On Mar-23-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 003

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-23-2005 Continued To Mar-23-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
KIMBERLY DUCKWORTH--Plaintiff/Respondent, with witnesses Colette Justin and Pamela Driver.
CAROL ALFARO AND ANDY ALFARO--Defendants/Appellants.

The parties were present as indicated above. All parties and witnessess were sworn in.
Plaintiff/Respondent testified. Witnesses Colette Justin and Pamela Driver were sworn and examined.

Plaintiff/Respondent offered the following exhibits:
1. Security deposit statement.
2. Photos in white book.
3. Letter dated 3/22/05 (2 pages).

Defendants/Appellants Andy Alfaro and Carol Alfaro, gave oral testimony and offered the following exhibits:
1. Inventory sheet.
2. letter (1 page).
3. letter dated 3/22/05 (1 page).

At the end of the hearing the court took the matter under submission.

Judge Curtis Karnow, Clerk Param Natt, Not reported (D. 003)
